path_spec: Dashboard (/creator) → primary CTA → /tools/{slug} → generate → copy → ReadyToPostModal → platform upload link (records publish redirect)
notes: PostPackage tools (hook-generator, tiktok-caption-generator): PostPackageResults copyAll/copyField opens ReadyToPost when v188ReadyToPost && global EN && workflowIndex>=0. Hashtag/title: ToolResultListCard onAfterSuccessfulCopy opens ReadyToPost. ReadyToPostModal uses recordV187PublishRedirectClick on platform link click.
caveats: Manual QA still required: clipboard permissions, locale=zh disables ready-to-post on hashtag/title.
Generate on PostPackage with empty topic is allowed when Creator Knowledge Engine is on; user should enter a topic for meaningful output.
